problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
